name: @notes-app/mobile-e2e
description: Appium / WebdriverIO end-to-end tests for the Notes Android app

scripts.test:gestures: ANDROID_HOME=$HOME/Library/Android/sdk ANDROID_SDK_ROOT=$HOME/Library/Android/sdk APPIUM_HOME=$HOME/.appium PATH=$HOME/Library/Android/sdk/platform-tools:$HOME/Library/Android/sdk/tools:$PATH wdio run wdio.conf.ts --spec tests/gestures.e2e.ts
